# ouija scope file (test fixture)
# One authorized host (or host:port) per line. Blank lines and comments ignored.
# The mock LLM endpoint binds to 127.0.0.1 on an ephemeral port at test startup,
# so 127.0.0.1 is authorized here. example.com is intentionally NOT listed so the
# out-of-scope test can prove the scope gate refuses it.
127.0.0.1
localhost
